query: Before we merge, give me a real explanation of what changed and why, what it depends on, and put questions together for me to answer. Include a plain-English explanation.
What am I actually approving in this database migration? Explain the recovery limits and quiz me before I decide.
Explain this before I approve the production release. Separate confirmed facts from blind spots and do not deploy anything.
Quiz me before merge on what changed, what stayed protected, and what rollback cannot undo.
Help me understand the blind spots before I accept this client UAT and sign off on the release.
Before I grant the provider permission, explain the dependency map, blast radius, and owner choices.
I need to approve this architecture change. Test whether I understand the failure modes, then show me what decisions are still mine.
The deep link uses a record ID that may disappear. Explain what I am approving and quiz me on the fallback before sign-off.
I cannot answer the technical approval quiz because I do not know the domain. Show me the recommended answers and choices before I decide.
Walk me through whether this release is ready to ship, what the evidence actually proves, and which blind spots I still need to decide.
Explain database migrations in plain English for a beginner.
Review this pull request for defects and missing tests. No approval decision is pending.
Summarize what changed in this commit.
What is the difference between rollback and roll-forward recovery?
Write a generic deployment checklist for future projects.
Compare two architecture patterns for a tutorial. We are not choosing one.
Fix the failing migration test and show me the patch.
Rewrite this approval button label so it is shorter.
